name: Kombo
description: Kombo unified HRIS and ATS API for seamless HR integrations in Europe

config.setupInstructions:
1. Log in to the Kombo Dashboard at https://app.kombo.dev
2. Go to Secrets page and create or copy your API Key
3. Go to Integrations, click the HRIS integration you want to monitor
4. Copy the Integration ID from the details page
5. Enter both values below

credentialFields.label: API Key
credentialFields.helpText: Kombo Dashboard -> Secrets page -> Create API Key

credentialFields.label: Integration ID
credentialFields.helpText: Found in Kombo Dashboard -> Integrations -> click on the integration -> copy the ID

checks.name: App Availability
checks.description: Verifies Kombo HR integration platform is accessible

checks.name: Employee Access
checks.description: Lists employees via Kombo HRIS API to verify HR data access
